title: aerangis rohlfsiana
intro: Aerangis rohlfsiana, also known as the Rohlfs' Aerangis or the Riebelei's Aerangis, is an epiphytic orchid species native to the tropical forests of West Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aerangis rohlfsiana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Aerangis rohlfsiana are often made into teas, infusions, or poultices, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
